headline: VICI Properties Expands Relationship With Cain & Eldridge Industries
summary: VICI deepens ties with Cain and Eldridge Industries via a $1.5B mezzanine loan for One Beverly Hills.

headline: VICI Deepens One Beverly Hills Role And Opens Experiential Growth Path
summary: VICI Properties (NYSE:VICI) has expanded its role in the One Beverly Hills development by providing a significant mezzanine loan. The company has entered into an ongoing partnership with Cain and Eldridge Industries focused on future experiential investments. The financing for One Beverly Hills ranks among the larger real estate development capital commitments of the past decade. For you as an investor, this move puts NYSE:VICI more firmly in the middle of high profile, mixed use real...

headline: One Beverly Hills developer raises $4.3 billion to finish the massive luxury project
summary: The developers of One Beverly Hills have secured $4.3 billion in financing to complete the project, another milestone for one of the largest real estate projects underway in the country.

headline: One Beverly Hills secures $4.3bn financing to complete development
summary: The project will deliver new residences, hotels, retail and open space with phased completion from 2027.

headline: The Retirement System Is Breaking - 3 Smart Moves To Protect Yourself
summary: Retirement faces unprecedented risks like unfavorable demographics, social security cuts, inflation, taxation, and equity market concentration. Read what investors need to know.
